properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14 v15 v16 v17 v18

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Genesis The Beginning of Days, Exodus God's People Were Slaves, He gave them his Law in Leviticus, In numbers They Wandered in the Wilderness.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Deuteronomy blessings or curse, Five books of Moses are the first, They're Called the Law, now Let's See, The Twelve books of Israel's history,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Joshua conquered the promise Land, Judges, seven sycles of sin, Ruth she was a Moabite, Until Boaz saw her and made her his wife.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: First Samuel Saul was king, Second Samuel David Reigned, First kings the nation was split, Second Kings Babylon conquered It.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: First and Second Chronicles, Retell the history of Israel, Ezra Taught the Captives God's ways, Nehemiah built the wall in 52 days.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Esther was the Queen of the land, Delivering the Jews from Haman's hand, History's done, and now is time, For five books of Poetry that don't even rhyme…

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Job is about great suppering, Psalms are songs that we pray and sing, Proverbs has daily wisdom for you, When you don't know what to do?

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Ecclesiastes, the meaning of life, Song of Solomon, husband and wife, That's the books of poetry, Now it's time for prophecy.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Isaiah said that Jesus would come, Jeremiah her comes Babylon, Lamentations poor Jerusalem, Ezekiel the temple we be built again?

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Daniel saw kingdoms Rise and fall, Hosea love Is unconditional, Joel's about the day of the Lord, Amos David's tent will be restored.

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Obadiah had a word for the Edomites, Jonah run away from the Ninevites, Micah "walk humbly with your God": Nahum Nineveh will be judged.

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Habakkuk, Questioned what God would do, Zephaniah the day of the lord part 2, Haggai, Zechariah, Malachi, Rebuild the temple and Give a tithe.

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Matthew, mark, Luke and John, The gospel Tell what Christ has done, Acts Tell how the gospel was spread Romans is the road to Righteousness.

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: First Corinthians Don't be sinful, Second Corinthians Paul the apostle, Galatians Christ has set us free, Ephesians is are new Identity.

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: Philippians Joy and Humility, Colossians the mystery of Christ and me, First Thessalonians a Faithful life, Second Thessalonians The Antichrist.

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: First timothy my son in the Faith, Second Timothy Finish the race, Titus how to pastor a Church, Philemon, Forgiving When you've Been Hurt.

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: Hebrews Shows Why Jesus is best?? James says Faith without works is dead, First Peter Teaches a Holy life, Second Peter sufferring for doing was Right.

verse.name: v18
verse.lines: First John God is Light and love, Second John-Love And Third John-love, Jude says for the Faith Content, Revelation Tell us How it all end…… How it all end.
